scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AlphaFold/OpenFold-style protein structure prediction, MSA generation, model parameters, structure prediction outputs, training, data preparation, and protein model API workflows.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained OpenFold-specific routing, command planning, data-layout validation, training planning, install troubleshooting, and programmatic API guidance.
scenarios.read_when: Requests mention OpenFold, AlphaFold-compatible inference, run_pretrained_openfold.py, train_openfold.py, SoloSeq, multimer, precomputed alignments, OpenProteinSet, OpenFold parameters, DeepSpeed OpenFold training, attn_core_inplace_cuda, or OpenFold config/model APIs.
scenarios.best_for: Planning OpenFold inference or training commands safely, validating OpenFold FASTA/MSA/mmCIF/alignment/cache layouts, diagnosing OpenFold installation/extension/backend failures, and using OpenFold config/weight/protein APIs.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about a different protein framework such as ColabFold, ESM, Boltz, Chai-1, ProteinMPNN, or RFdiffusion without OpenFold-specific code or assets.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `openfold` when the user names OpenFold or its scripts/APIs. Within the skill, route install/assets first for dependency or database questions, inference for prediction commands, data-preparation for FASTA/MSA/mmCIF/cache layouts, training for train_openfold.py/DeepSpeed, and model-apis for Python config/weight/model internals.

scenarios.title: Distributed PyTorch Training and Large Model Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Distributed PyTorch training, DeepSpeed, PyTorch Lightning, GPU precision, checkpointing, and large-model memory planning where OpenFold is the target package.
scenarios.role: Adds OpenFold-specific train_openfold.py, DeepSpeed config, checkpoint, seed, data-cache, and GPU runtime guidance to generic distributed PyTorch workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Requests mention OpenFold training, fine-tuning, train_openfold.py, OpenProteinSet, DeepSpeed OpenFold configs, BF16/A100, multi-node OpenFold, resume_from_ckpt, or OpenFold training data caches.
scenarios.best_for: Constructing dry-run OpenFold training/fine-tuning commands, generating DeepSpeed JSON safely, and diagnosing OpenFold-specific distributed training prerequisites.
scenarios.avoid_when: The request is generic DeepSpeed, Lightning, Accelerate, FSDP, or LLM training without OpenFold-specific data or scripts.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Use this secondary scenario only when OpenFold training is central; choose the protein-structure scenario for prediction, data prep, installation, or API tasks.
